_comment: Per-machine Slack app for slack-reactor. ONE app per machine: a Slack app has exactly one Events Request URL, which points at exactly one machine's tunnel. Name the app per host (e.g. 'reactor-mukuls-mbp') so they're distinguishable in the workspace. The no-invite behavior comes from user_events + scopes.user (NOT bot_events): user-token events fire for every channel the authorizing user can see, with no bot in the channel. Set request_url to this machine's cloudflared hostname + /slack/events.

display_information.name: reactor-REPLACE-HOSTNAME
display_information.description: React an emoji on a thread to capture it as a /todo on one machine
